Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

Briceno Electric upgraded our ancient electrical panel and we couldn't be happier. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. Our lights don't flicker anymore when the AC kicks on! Highly recommend.

D
David S.

Had a couple of outlets that weren't working. Briceno Electric came out quickly and fixed them both. The electrician was friendly and knowledgeable. Good service, fair price.

L
Linda K.

Briceno Electric installed recessed lighting in our kitchen, and it looks amazing! They helped us choose the right fixtures and did a fantastic job with the installation. Very professional and clean work.

R
Robert B.

Got my EV charger installed by Briceno Electric. They were super helpful in picking out the right one for my car and the installation was smooth. I was a little worried about the heat, but they made sure to install it in a shaded area. Great job!

Additional Electrician Services

Briceno Electric — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every electrician project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Briceno Electric Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific electrician needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Bakersfield & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Bakersfield, CA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Bakersfield Oildale Rosedale Shafter Wasco Lamont Arvin Tehachapi
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our electrician services.

How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?

We offer 24/7 emergency repair services and strive to respond as quickly as possible, typically within the hour, depending on your location in the Bakersfield area.

Are your electricians licensed and insured?

Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We adhere to all safety regulations and industry standards.

Do you offer upfront pricing?

Yes, we provide a detailed estimate before starting any work, so you know exactly what to expect. We believe in transparent and honest pricing.

Built on Bakersfield Values

Contact Briceno Electric for expert electrical services in Bakersfield and surrounding areas.

Let's Begin →
